{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1989
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1989
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = July 19 – September 2
|num_teams       = 32
|winners       = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
|second       = [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]
|matches         = 61
|goals           = 137
|scoring_leader = [[Gérson da Silva]] (7)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = 
|next_season      = [[1990 Copa do Brasil|1990]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1989''' was the 1st staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on July 19, 1989, and concluded on September 2, 1989, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Olímpico Monumental]] in [[Porto Alegre]], in which [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] lifted the trophy for the first time with a 2–1 victory over [[Sport Club do Recife|Sport Recife]].

Gérson, of [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]], with seven goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The competition was disputed by 32 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played in two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used.

==Participating teams==
{|border="0" cellpadding="2"
|- valign="top"
|
*[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
*[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético (GO)]]
*[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]
*[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]
*[[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí (SC)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]
*[[Blumenau Esporte Clube|Blumenau (SC)]]
*[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança (SE)]] 
*[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]
*[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]
*[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]
*[[Ferroviário Atlético Clube|Ferroviário (CE)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo (PI)]]
*[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]
*[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]
*[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
*[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]
*[[Ibiraçu Esporte Clube|Ibiraçu (ES)]] 
*[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]
*[[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto (MT)]]
*[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]
*[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]
|width="50"|&nbsp;
|valign="top"|
*[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]]
*[[Esporte Clube Pinheiros (PR)|Pinheiros (PR)]] 
*[[Atlético Rio Negro Clube|Rio Negro (AM)]]
*[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]] 
*[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]
*[[Grêmio Esportivo Tiradentes|Tiradentes (DF)]]
*[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'
*[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]
|}

==Competition stages==
{{32TeamBracket
| RD1-team01 =[[Atlético Rio Negro Clube|Rio Negro (AM)]]
| RD1-team02 ='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score01=1 1
| RD1-score02=1 2 
| RD1-team03 ='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-team04 =[[Avaí Futebol Clube|Avaí (SC)]]
| RD1-score03=2 0
| RD1-score04=0 1 
| RD1-team05 ='''[[Guarani Futebol Clube|Guarani (SP)]]'''
| RD1-team06 =[[Esporte Clube Flamengo|Flamengo (PI)]]
| RD1-score05=3 1
| RD1-score06=1 1 
| RD1-team07 =[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]] 
| RD1-team08 ='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score07=0 0
| RD1-score08=0 1 
| RD1-team09 =[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]] 
| RD1-team10 ='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]''' 
| RD1-score09=0 0
| RD1-score10=3 7
| RD1-team11 ='''[[Clube Náutico Capibaribe|Náutico (PE)]]''' 
| RD1-team12 =[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]
| RD1-score11=1 0
| RD1-score12=0 0 
| RD1-team13 ='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]''' 
| RD1-team14 =[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]
| RD1-score13=0 2
| RD1-score14=0 0 
| RD1-team15 ='''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]'''
| RD1-team16 =[[Ferroviário Atlético Clube|Ferroviário (CE)]]
| RD1-score15=1 3
| RD1-score16=0 1 
| RD1-team17 ='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]''' 
| RD1-team18 =[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]]
| RD1-score17=2 0
| RD1-score18=2 1 
| RD1-team19 ='''[[Blumenau Esporte Clube|Blumenau (SC)]]''' 
| RD1-team20 =[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]
| RD1-score19=1 1
| RD1-score20=1 0 
| RD1-team21 =[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]] 
| RD1-team22 ='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score21=3 0
| RD1-score22=2 1 
| RD1-team23 ='''[[Grêmio Esportivo Tiradentes|Tiradentes (DF)]]''' 
| RD1-team24 =[[Atlético Clube Goianiense|Atlético (GO)]]
| RD1-score23=1 0
| RD1-score24=0 0 
| RD1-team25 =[[Ibiraçu Esporte Clube|Ibiraçu (ES)]] 
| RD1-team26 ='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score25=0 0 
| RD1-score26=1 6
| RD1-team27 =[[Esporte Clube Pinheiros (PR)|Pinheiros (PR)]] 
| RD1-team28 ='''[[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto (MT)]]'''
| RD1-score27=0 1
| RD1-score28=1 2 
| RD1-team29 ='''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]''' 
| RD1-team30 =[[Botafogo Futebol Clube (PB)|Botafogo (PB)]]
| RD1-score29=0 1
| RD1-score30=0 1 
| RD1-team31 =[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança (SE)]] 
| RD1-team32 ='''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score31=0 0
| RD1-score32=1 1 
| RD2-team01 =Vasco (RJ) 
| RD2-team02 ='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-score01=0 1
| RD2-score02=0 2 
| RD2-team03 =Guarani (SP) 
| RD2-team04 ='''Sport (PE)'''
| RD2-score03=1 0
| RD2-score04=1 1 
| RD2-team05 ='''Atlético (MG)''' 
| RD2-team06 =Náutico (PE)
| RD2-score05=1 3
| RD2-score06=1 0
| RD2-team07 =Internacional (RS) 
| RD2-team08 ='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD2-score07=0 0
| RD2-score08=0 4 
| RD2-team09 ='''Flamengo (RJ)''' 
| RD2-team10 =Blumenau
| RD2-score09=3 3
| RD2-score10=1 1 
| RD2-team11 ='''Corinthians (SP)''' 
| RD2-team12 =Tiradentes (DF)
| RD2-score11=5 0
| RD2-score12=0 1 
| RD2-team13 ='''Grêmio (RS)''' 
| RD2-team14 =Mixto (MT)
| RD2-score13=5 1
| RD2-score14=0 (WO) 
| RD2-team15 =Cruzeiro (MG) 
| RD2-team16 ='''Bahia (BA)'''
| RD2-score15=1 0
| RD2-score16=0 2 
| RD3-team01 =Vitória (BA) 
| RD3-team02 ='''Sport (PE)'''
| RD3-score01=1 0
| RD3-score02=0 2 
| RD3-team03 ='''Goiás (GO)''' 
| RD3-team04 =Atlético (MG)
| RD3-score03=3 0
| RD3-score04=0 2 
| RD3-team05 ='''Flamengo (RJ)''' 
| RD3-team06 =Corinthians (SP)
| RD3-score05=2 2
| RD3-score06=0 4 
| RD3-team07 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD3-team08 =Bahia (BA)
| RD3-score07=1 2
| RD3-score08=0 0 
| RD4-team01 =Goiás (GO) 
| RD4-team02 ='''Sport (PE)'''
| RD4-score01=2 0
| RD4-score02=1 1 
| RD4-team03 =Flamengo (RJ) 
| RD4-team04 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD4-score03=2 1
| RD4-score04=2 6 
| RD5-team01 =Sport (PE) 
| RD5-team02 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD5-score01=0 1
| RD5-score02=0 2 
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1989 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Rio Grande do Sul.svg|100px|Rio Grande do Sul]]<br>'''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''<br/>'''First Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070828171410/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1989.htm Copa do Brasil 1989 at RSSSF]

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1989}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1989]]
[[Category:1989 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1989 in domestic association football cups]]
